ddt:Target.Name: T4_BCM_BIS_DDT2000_SW2_1
ddt:Target.Description:
The DDT 2000 file is auto generated by Power tool. (DIESE/65690/Séction BCM/UET Modélisation)
2009.09.30 - Creation

Data.Name: ACTIVATE_INTERIOR_LIGHTING_CF
Data.Comment: Set when the interior lighting shall be configured.

Data.Name: ANTI_HIJACK_CF
Data.Comment: Set when the anti hijack (or single door unlocking) shall be configured.

Data.Name: ApprovalNumber.LowerPart
Data.Comment: Certificate

Data.Name: AT_CF
Data.Comment: Set when the automatic gear box shall be configured.

Data.Name: AUTO_RELOCK_TIMEOUT_CF
Data.Comment: Set <> 0 when the auto relock shall be configured. (typical value is 2 min)

Data.Name: AUTO_WINDOW_CLOSING_CF
Data.Comment: Set when the auto windows closing shall be configured.

Data.Name: BRAKE_ECU_PRESENT_CF
Data.Comment: Set when brake ecu is configured.

Data.Name: Output Control Command
Data.Comment: Command enumeration

Screen.Name: After Sales BCM and CIDs PAIRING

Label.Text: AFTER SALES BCM or Customer IDs pairing
Complete the "After Sales Code" (16 bytes) and press the button "ENTER AFTER SALES MODE"
If the AFTER SALES MODE for BCM is launched, then put Ignition ON with a CID belonging to the vehicle
Press the button "CID PAIRING" for each CID to pair
Once all CIDs are paired, select "Validate" and press the button "EXIT AFTER SALES MODE"
Press the button "BCM PAIRING" to pair the BCM
If the BCM is paired, the EXIT of the AFTER SALES MODE is automatic. Then launch again the AFTER SALES MODE to do the pairing of all customers IDs
If the AFTER SALES MODE for CID is launched, then put Ignition ON with a CID (belonging to the vehicle or blank)
3) Complete the "After Sales Code" (16 bytes) and press the button "ENTER ECM AFTER SALES MODE"
4) If the authorization to pair the ECM is OK, put Ignition ON. Once the ECM is paired, the exit of the ECM AFTER SALES MODE is automatic
1) Put Ignition ON and check that the ECM is blank
To Cancel the authorization to pair the ECM, press the button "EXIT ECM AFTER SALES PAIRING"
